_comment: claude-development-eco-system hooks fragment. Merge the 'hooks' block into your ~/.claude/settings.json. All hooks are opt-in; review each before enabling. Replace ECO_ROOT with the absolute path to your claude-development-eco-system clone.

PostToolUse._description: Auto-format TypeScript/JavaScript files after edits. Requires prettier on PATH or local to the repo.
Auto-format Python files after edits. Requires ruff and black on PATH or local to the repo.

UserPromptSubmit._description: Inject a one-line banner showing the current plan stage if a plan file is detected. Informational only — never blocks.
